description: Replaces exact phrase matching with OR-expansion for multi-token queries to fix zero-result failures.
rationale: Current phrase wrapping causes 19 of 30 eval queries to return zero results because multi-word topics rarely appear as exact phrases. OR-expansion trades phrase precision for dramatically higher recall.
expected_improvements: Multi-word topic queries (e.g., "autoresearch projects", "railway deploy issues") should find results instead of returning zero. Bag-of-words matching will surface messages containing any of the query terms.
unified_diff:
--- a/engine/server.py
+++ b/engine/server.py
@@ -114,17 +114,15 @@ def health():
 # =============================================================
 # QUERY FUNCTIONS — shared by REST endpoints and MCP tools
 # =============================================================
 
 def _auto_phrase(q: str) -> str:
-    """Wrap bare multi-token queries in quotes so BM25 ranks positional
-    phrase matches instead of bag-of-words token density. Callers passing
-    explicit FTS5 syntax (quotes, booleans, NEAR, prefix*, column filters,
-    grouping) pass through unchanged. Also makes hyphenated tokens work
-    without requiring callers to quote them themselves."""
+    """Expand bare multi-token queries to OR terms for broad recall instead
+    of forcing exact phrase match. Single-token queries and explicit FTS5
+    syntax (quotes, operators, wildcards) pass through unchanged."""
     if not q or any(c in q for c in '"*():^'):
         return q
     tokens = q.split()
     if any(op in tokens for op in ("AND", "OR", "NOT", "NEAR")):
         return q
-    return f'"{q}"'
+    return ' OR '.join(tokens) if len(tokens) > 1 else q
 
 
 def query_search(q: str, limit: int = 20, type: str = None, workspace_id: str = None):

score_reasons.retrieval: MRR improved by 0.18 and 11 queries fixed, but 1 query regressed (cross-session category), triggering the regression penalty cap.
score_reasons.minimalism: Net negative two lines, removes phrase-wrapping complexity, replaces with simpler OR-expansion that dramatically improves recall.
score_reasons.reliability: Preserves all FTS5 syntax passthrough guards, handles single-token and multi-token cases correctly, no new failure modes introduced.
score_reasons.taste: Clean idiomatic code, precise description naming exact mechanism, clear docstring, matches existing style and patterns perfectly.
